modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Dock for laptop isn't powering on at all

full_description_text:  
So, I tried to turn on my laptop dock, but nothing happened.  
Like, there are no lights or anything when I press the button.  
I really need it to work so I can connect my stuff.  
It's just super frustrating that it won't power on!
